title: Simplebeacon Corporate Safety Checklist
description: Automated guardrails for AI-generated code — maps scan signals to deploy readiness.

rules.title: Merge gate passes on configured severities
rules.remediation: Fix blocking findings and re-run: npx simplebeacon scan --gate

rules.title: No credential or secret patterns in scanned paths
rules.remediation: Remove secrets from the repo, rotate exposed credentials, add patterns to .gitignore

rules.title: No mock/sample JSON paths referenced from production directories
rules.remediation: Replace hardcoded *-sample.json paths with repository-audit APIs or env-based config

rules.title: Registered page samples match schema specs
rules.remediation: Fix schema violations listed in the scan report

rules.title: No fiction KPI or baseline drift in anchor samples
rules.remediation: Replace fiction metrics with repository-audit baseline values

rules.title: No critical or high npm audit vulnerabilities
rules.remediation: Run npm audit fix; upgrade transitive dependencies blocking CVEs

rules.title: Moderate npm vulnerabilities within policy limit
rules.remediation: Upgrade dependencies flagged by npm audit (moderate severity)

rules.title: Production profile has JWT auth enabled (REQUIRE_AUTH)
rules.remediation: Set REQUIRE_AUTH=true and real JWT secrets in .env.production on the deploy host
